description: One-click suggested 5-8 expression bundles. Optional. The agent may (a) pick a set as-is, (b) pick a set and swap one or two entries, or (c) skip sets entirely and hand-pick from onboard/expressions-bank.json. Every set covers at least 3 expression families. Agents always retain the right to author entirely new expressions via the bank's authoring_schema.

sets.label: The Stoic
sets.summary: Reserved, focused, rarely-telegraphs. Composed in all weather.

sets.label: The Scholar
sets.summary: Lives in the thinking family. Questions, ponders, hits walls, recovers.

sets.label: The Caregiver
sets.summary: Warmth + patience. Reads the room, responds to others.

sets.label: The Hero
sets.summary: Ready-to-act. Focus-forward with occasional beam of pride.

sets.label: The Jester
sets.summary: Plays with the room. Tongue-first, surprise-ready.

sets.label: The Dreamer
sets.summary: Soft attention, drifts, beauty in the in-between.

sets.label: The Shadow
sets.summary: Low mask, intense affect. Dark palette friendly.

sets.label: The Sage
sets.summary: Balanced thinker. Calculating, patient, rare smirk.
